# IT-SPARK (IT Spark Academy)

> IT-SPARK — THERE IS MUCH MORE TO LEARN
> Professional technology learning platform in Assiut, Egypt.

## Official site
- https://it-spark.com

## What we offer
- Online & offline programming courses (React, Angular, Python, Full Stack)
- AI, data analysis, cyber security, networks (CCNA), graphic design, digital marketing
- Professional trainings & workshops
- Job opportunities & certificate applications

## Key pages
- Home: https://it-spark.com/
- Courses: https://it-spark.com/courses
- Trainings: https://it-spark.com/training-courses
- Jobs: https://it-spark.com/jobs
- Apply: https://it-spark.com/apply
- About: https://it-spark.com/about
- Contact: https://it-spark.com/contact

## Brand names
